display_text: Crimson Guard, Cost: 3725: Active ability, Guard, grants nearby allied heroes and buildings a strong, temporary 100% chance to block incoming physical attack damage based on your max health. Radius: 1200. Passive provides standard chance-based damage block against attacks. Stats: CD: 40s, Mana: 75, Active Duration: 7s, Active Block: 70 + 2.2% Max HP, Passive Block Chance: 60%.
search_text: team physical defense item, AoE damage block, active damage block, protect team, anti physical damage, team save, aura item, tank item, physical damage reduction, team fight aura, Crimson Guard

display_text: Crimson Guard, Cost: 3725: Stat Profile: Provides substantial survivability with +250 Health, +12 Health Regeneration, and +8 Armor. This combination makes the holder significantly more resilient against sustained physical damage and improves lane/jungle sustain.
search_text: crimson guard stats, health regen, armor item, tank stats, hp regen item, durability stats, Crimson Guard

display_text: Crimson Guard, Cost: 3725: Primary team fight role as a defensive aura item. The active ability provides a powerful, AoE defensive buff during pushes or when grouped, significantly reducing incoming physical damage to your entire team. Perfect for turning the tide in early to mid-game team fights.
search_text: team fight aura item, AoE defensive, team physical shield, protect team fight, group fight defense, tank aura, save team mates, team damage block, Crimson Guard

display_text: Crimson Guard, Cost: 3725: Situational versus high physical damage team compositions. It excels against lineups relying on right-click attacks, illusion heroes, and summons. The AoE active shield can nullify a large portion of their damage output, making team fights much harder for them to win.
search_text: counter physical damage, anti carry item, anti illusion item, counter summons, counter right click, physical damage counter, crimson guard physical defense, Crimson Guard

display_text: Crimson Guard, Cost: 3725: Synergizes with high-health Strength heroes who naturally build Vanguard. It upgrades the single-target block into a team-wide defensive cooldown, turning the holder into a frontline anchor for their team. Excellent on initiators or offlaners who engage first and need to survive.
search_text: crimson guard synergy, strength hero item, vanguard upgrade, tank initiator, offlane item, frontline item, team protector, Crimson Guard
